PowerShell($date = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"; tar -a -cf "C:\\BACKUP-trading-copilote-$date.zip" -C C:\\ trading-copilote && Get-Item "C:\\BACKUP-trading-copilote-$date.zip" | Select-Object FullName, @{N='Mo';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell($date = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"; tar -a -cf "C:\\Users\\mytra\\BACKUP-trading-copilote-$date.zip" -C C:\\ trading-copilote && Get-Item "C:\\Users\\mytra\\BACKUP-trading-copilote-$date.zip" | Select-Object FullName, @{N='Mo';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell($dirs = "00-pilotage","01-moteur-transvideo","02-sources-brutes","03-transcriptions","04-cerveau-trading","05-saas","06-skills","_archive","_temp"; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "C:\\trading-copilote\\$d" | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote" -Directory | Select-Object Name | Out-String)
Read(//c/trading-copilote/**)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote\\00-pilotage" | Select-Object Name, @{N='Type';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'Dossier'}else{'Fichier'}}} | Out-String; "=== Racine apres Phase 3 ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote" -File | Select-Object Name | Out-String)

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; git mv scripts "01-moteur-transvideo/scripts" && git mv transvideo_pipeline.bat "01-moteur-transvideo/" && "--- MOVE OK ---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote\\01-moteur-transvideo" -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{N='Fichier';E={$_.FullName.Substring\(41\)}} | Out-String)
PowerShell(git -C C:\\trading-copilote diff -- "01-moteur-transvideo/scripts/agent.py" "01-moteur-transvideo/scripts/chunk_fuse.py")

PowerShell("01-methode-belkhayate","02-marches-trading","06-playbook" | ForEach-Object { "=== $_ ==="; \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote\\$_" -Recurse -File\).Count.ToString\(\) + " fichiers" }; "=== 04-kb-sources \(detail\) ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote\\04-kb-sources" -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $rel = $_.FullName.Substring\(34\); if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"[D] $rel"}else{"[F] $rel"} } | Out-String)

PowerShell("=== 02-sources-brutes \(structure\) ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote\\02-sources-brutes" -Recurse -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Substring\(38\) } | Out-String; "Total fichiers deplaces : $\(\(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\trading-copilote\\02-sources-brutes' -Recurse -File\).Count\)"; "=== Reste dans 04-kb-sources \(pour Phases 6 et 9\) ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote\\04-kb-sources" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'transcripts' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Substring\(34\) } | Out-String; "+ transcripts\\ : $\(\(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\trading-copilote\\04-kb-sources\\youtube-a-scraper\\transcripts' -File\).Count\) fichiers + temp_audio")

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "03-transcriptions\\transcripts-bruts" | Out-Null; $files = Get-ChildItem "04-kb-sources\\youtube-a-scraper\\transcripts" -File; foreach \($f in $files\) { git mv "04-kb-sources/youtube-a-scraper/transcripts/$\($f.Name\)" "03-transcriptions/transcripts-bruts/$\($f.Name\)"; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { throw "ECHEC git mv sur $\($f.Name\)" } }; "--- $\($files.Count\) fichiers deplaces via git mv ---"; "Reste dans transcripts\\ :"; Get-ChildItem "04-kb-sources\\youtube-a-scraper\\transcripts" | Select-Object Name | Out-String)

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; $items = Get-ChildItem "07-nouvelles sources"; foreach \($i in $items\) { git mv "07-nouvelles sources/$\($i.Name\)" "03-transcriptions/nouvelles-sources/$\($i.Name\)"; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { throw "ECHEC git mv sur $\($i.Name\)" } }; "--- $\($items.Count\) elements deplaces ---"; "07-nouvelles sources vide ? $\(\(Get-ChildItem '07-nouvelles sources' -Force\).Count -eq 0\)"; Remove-Item "07-nouvelles sources" -Force; "Ancien dossier supprime \(etait vide\)"; "=== 03-transcriptions ==="; Get-ChildItem "03-transcriptions" -Recurse -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Substring\(38\) }; "nouvelles-sources : $\(\(Get-ChildItem '03-transcriptions\\nouvelles-sources' -Recurse -File\).Count\) fichiers / transcripts-bruts : $\(\(Get-ChildItem '03-transcriptions\\transcripts-bruts' -File\).Count\) fichiers")

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; git mv "code/__init__.py" "05-saas/" && git mv "code/config" "05-saas/config" && git mv "code/engine" "05-saas/engine" && git mv "code/knowledge_base" "05-saas/knowledge_base" && git mv "code/utils" "05-saas/utils" && "--- code -> 05-saas OK ---"; $skills = Get-ChildItem "05-skills" -File; foreach \($s in $skills\) { git mv "05-skills/$\($s.Name\)" "06-skills/$\($s.Name\)"; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { throw "ECHEC sur $\($s.Name\)" } }; "--- $\($skills.Count\) skills -> 06-skills OK ---"; if \(\(Get-ChildItem "code" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item "code" -Force; "Dossier code\\ vide supprime" }; if \(\(Get-ChildItem "05-skills" -Force\).Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item "05-skills" -Force; "Dossier 05-skills\\ vide supprime" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; Move-Item "_backup_transvideo_phase1_20260518_234159" "_archive\\_backup_transvideo_phase1_20260518_234159"; "--- backup deplace \(Move-Item, dossier non suivi\) ---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\trading-copilote" -Recurse -Directory -Filter "__pycache__" -Force | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; "--- __pycache__ purges : $\(\(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\trading-copilote' -Recurse -Directory -Filter '__pycache__' -Force\).Count\) restants ---"; $reste = Get-ChildItem "04-kb-sources" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($reste.Count -eq 0 -or \($reste | Where-Object {-not $_.PSIsContainer}\).Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item "04-kb-sources" -Recurse -Force; "--- 04-kb-sources \(vide\) supprime ---" } else { "ATTENTION 04-kb-sources non vide :"; $reste | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName } })

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; "=== _temp ==="; Get-ChildItem "_temp" -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{N='Fichier';E={$_.FullName.Substring\(26\)}}, @{N='Mo';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "=== _archive \(niveau 1\) ==="; Get-ChildItem "_archive" | Select-Object Name, @{N='Type';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'Dossier'}else{'Fichier'}}} | Out-String; "=== git : audio bien ignore ? ==="; git check-ignore -v "_temp/w9bbZbBNHwM.webm" "_temp/temp_audio/PontST7xYSs.mp3"; "=== git status \(extrait audio/archive\) ==="; git status --short | Select-String -Pattern 'webm|mp3|whisper_pipeline|_temp' | Out-String)

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; git mv "logs" "_archive/old-logs" && "--- logs -> _archive\\old-logs OK ---"; git mv "transcription-engine/RAPPORT_codex-transvideo.md" "00-pilotage/RAPPORT_codex-transvideo.md" && "--- rapport -> 00-pilotage OK ---"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "_archive\\transcription-engine" | Out-Null; Move-Item "transcription-engine\\.claude" "_archive\\transcription-engine\\.claude"; "--- config session morte -> _archive \(Move-Item, non suivie\) ---"; if \(\(Get-ChildItem "transcription-engine" -Force\).Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item "transcription-engine" -Force; "--- transcription-engine \(vide\) supprime : faux projet imbrique elimine ---" } else { "ATTENTION: transcription-engine non vide"; Get-ChildItem "transcription-engine" -Force | Select-Object Name }; git mv "visuels frontend" "05-saas/maquettes" && "--- visuels frontend -> 05-saas\\maquettes OK ---")

PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; "=== RACINE FINALE ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne '.git' } | Select-Object Name, @{N='Type';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'Dossier'}else{'Fichier'}}} | Out-String; "=== GIT STATUS \(resume\) ==="; $st = git status --short; "Lignes de changements : $\($st.Count\)"; $st | Group-Object { $_.Substring\(0,2\).Trim\(\) } | Select-Object Name, Count | Out-String)
PowerShell(cd C:\\trading-copilote; $st = git status --short; if \($st.Count -eq 0\) { "git status : PROPRE \(aucun changement en attente\)" } else { $st }; git log --oneline -3)
